nasb.text: If its owner is with it, he shall not make restitution; if it is hired, it came for its hire.

esv.text: If the owner was with it, he shall not make restitution; if it was hired, it came for its hiring fee.

cnv.text: 如果物主在場，他就不必償還；若是雇來的，也不必償還，因為他為雇價來的。

ccb.text: 倘若物主当时在场，借的人就不用赔偿。倘若牲畜是租来的，租的人只需付租金不用赔偿。
